# INTENT

## User Request

Fix the QR builder so style and color changes actually affect the rendered QR preview, and tighten the layout so the section uses its box better with less empty space.

## Requested Outcome

The QR builder should update live when options change and feel more compact and balanced.

## Constraints

- Keep the slice focused on the frontend QR builder.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
